name: Fruit and Nut Easter Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the sugar, syrup, and water to 265 degrees Fahrenheit on a candy thermometer.
2. Add the marshmallow cream and beat until almost firm.
3. Stir in the melted shortening, confectioner's sugar, candied fruit, and nuts. Mix well.
4. Shape eggs by hand and dip in dipping chocolate.
5. Makes 10 eggs which will keep for 6-8 months.
6. After the chocolate is firm, pipe a name on each egg.
